title: TTT Vanilla Horizons Plus
description:
Play a vanilla-esc modpack with certain Q.O.L. additions.
Vertical Slabs, Better Horses, Better Minecarts, and more!
body:
# Creation
Originally crafted for The Terrifying Temmies community, this modpack is now available for everyone to enjoy and customize to their heart's content.

# ✨ Key Features
- Stay Current - Built with rapid updates in mind, allowing you to experience the latest Minecraft versions without long waits.
- Performance Optimized - Carefully selected optimization mods ensure smooth gameplay even on modest hardware.
- Quality of Life Enhanced - Streamlined with essential improvements that make building and playing more enjoyable:
  - Vertical Slabs - Expand your building possibilities
  - Litematica - Perfect for complex builds and schematics
  - Axiom - Advanced world editing capabilities

# 🔧 Fully Customizable
This modpack serves as your foundation - feel free to:

- Adjust any configuration settings
- Add your favorite mods
- Remove anything that doesn't fit your playstyle
